segments.original_text: いやもう上品選手笑っちゃってるじゃんもう

segments.text: Pichu's way too strong, and that damage output is absolutely insane!
segments.original_text: ものすぎるピチューそして攻撃力が高すぎるYン

segments.text: But they broke through with pure attack power!
segments.original_text: しかしそこを攻撃力で貫いた

full_text: Oh man, Joppin's already laughing! It's way too— Pichu's way too strong, and that damage output is absolutely insane! This overwhelming situation! But they broke through with pure attack power!
